bindings.title: Cassette transfer deck
bindings.excerpt: The deck now opens straight into the procedural mechanics of a live-music commons rather than reading as brand wallpaper.
bindings.source_title: Live Music Archive (etree.org) – Internet Archive Help Center
bindings.source_summary: A procedural guide to permissions, formats, upload rules, and volunteer-fan public archiving in the Live Music Archive.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Internet Archive Live Music Archive help page

bindings.title: Tape intake form
bindings.excerpt: The intake sheet links out to obsessive metadata culture instead of declaring the mission out loud.
bindings.source_summary: A handmade public archive of liner-note transcription and recording credits that treats metadata as part of the art.

bindings.title: Transfer desk sign
bindings.excerpt: The desk sign opens to live Jaipongan energy so the room never collapses into a single archive mood.
bindings.source_title: Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI
bindings.source_summary: A communal performance clip that keeps the desk connected to rhythm, choreography, and live social energy.
bindings.source_image_alt: YouTube thumbnail for Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI

bindings.title: Commons values note
bindings.excerpt: The hidden values note goes somewhere self-aware and strange instead of sermonizing: algorithmic folklore and sensory commentary.
bindings.source_title: Tung Tung Tung Sahur’s sensonarrative power
bindings.source_summary: A dense essay on AI meme circulation, Indonesian wake-up signal culture, and commentary ecologies.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Algorithmic Folklore essay

bindings.title: Notes/index file
bindings.excerpt: The card file opens into a slower heritage lane: transmission, notation, and preserved musical memory.
bindings.source_title: Guqin and its music - UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage
bindings.source_summary: UNESCO documentation of the guqin as a living heritage practice of transmission, repertory, and listening.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the UNESCO guqin page

bindings.title: Cinema case file
bindings.excerpt: The pinned dossier gives one wall pocket a clean jump into John Woo and Hard Boiled.
bindings.source_summary: Criterion frames Hard Boiled as violence-as-poetry and gives the desk a concrete Hong Kong action-cinema branch.

bindings.title: Labeled drawer stack
bindings.excerpt: The drawers make the mixed ecology explicit by jumping from the archive room into practical native-plant planning.
bindings.source_summary: A stepwise guide to native plant palette, bed planning, and habitat structure.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Homegrown National Park native landscape page

bindings.title: Screenshot print stack
bindings.excerpt: The print stack keeps the page pointed at real public-reference matter instead of empty aesthetic props.
bindings.source_title: Live Music Archive (etree.org) – Internet Archive Help Center
bindings.source_summary: Archive procedure, upload guidance, and public-access rules presented as working material.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Internet Archive Live Music Archive help page
